CustomField.description: Shows the total amount paid toward this invoice in USD (ledger currency). This value is calculated using the actual exchange rate applied on each payment.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Shows the total amount paid toward this invoice in USD (ledger currency). This value is calculated using the actual exchange rate applied on each payment.
CustomField.label: Amount Paid(Ledger)

summaryFilterItems.value: Pending, Declined, Cancelled, Submitted for Approval
